exploration_notes:
Investigation identified three root causes for multi-device U2F authentication issues:

1. **Single-device lock-in for old/web clients** (lib/auth/auth.go:830-884): The `U2FAuthenticateChallenge` struct embeds a single `*u2f.AuthenticateChallenge` for backward compatibility. When JSON-serialized, Go flattens the embedded struct fields to the top level. Old clients (and the web UI via POST /webapi/u2f/signrequest) only read these top-level fields, seeing only 1 device challenge out of N registere
